claims.claim_text: The runtime is a governance/runtime layer and not a universal host replacement.

source_refs.contains: not that this runtime fully replaces Codex host execution in every environment
不应声称本项目已经在所有环境下完全接管 Codex 宿主执行

claims.claim_text: Onboarding can infer missing gate commands by default from the declared primary language.

source_refs.contains: `onboard` now infers missing build/test/contract commands from `-PrimaryLanguage` by default.
`onboard` 现在默认会根据 `-PrimaryLanguage` 推断缺失的 build/test/contract 命令。

claims.claim_text: Medium/high-risk writes remain approval-bound in governed write flows.

source_refs.contains: Path C (risky writes): run `govern-attachment-write -> decide-attachment-write -> execute-attachment-write` for medium/high-risk mutations.
路径 C（中高风险写入）：用 `govern-attachment-write -> decide-attachment-write -> execute-attachment-write` 走审批与回滚引用闭环。

claims.claim_text: The canonical acceptance chain remains build -> test -> contract/invariant -> hotspot.

source_refs.contains: Canonical acceptance chain: runtime-managed `build -> test -> contract/invariant -> hotspot`.
验收链统一执行：`build -> test -> contract/invariant -> hotspot` 由 runtime-managed gate 流统一执行，降低漏检。

claims.claim_text: Speed posture claims are evidence-window based and cite KPI snapshots (`latest` or `rolling`) instead of anecdotal impressions.

source_refs.contains: speed claims must cite measured windows from `kpi-latest.json` or `kpi-rolling.json`, not anecdotal runtime impressions
speed 相关对外表述必须引用 `kpi-latest.json` 或 `kpi-rolling.json` 的 measured window，不能使用 anecdotal 体感描述

claims.claim_text: Complete hybrid final-state closure is certified on the current branch baseline by GAP-111 evidence and remains subject to claim-drift gates.

source_refs.contains: `GAP-104..111` 已在当前分支基线上完成，完整混合终态闭环由 `docs/change-evidence/20260427-gap-111-complete-hybrid-final-state-certification.md` 记录。
Complete realization is now certified on the current branch baseline by the post-`GAP-103` queue `GAP-104..111`.

claims.claim_text: Post-GAP-111 external source assumptions are machine-checked before they can strengthen final-state claims.

source_refs.contains: Keep `GAP-111` certification valid only while current-source compatibility checks and claim-drift gates continue to pass.
Post-`GAP-111` protocol adoption must include a current-source compatibility review.

claims.claim_text: LTP heavy-stack promotion is autonomous only when the promotion policy selects exactly one evidence-triggered package; otherwise it defers all packages or requires owner-directed labeling.

source_refs.contains: Do not directly force the full heavy stack as the default route.
defer_without_trigger_evidence

claims.claim_text: Autonomous continuation after the LTP promotion fence is selected by a next-work policy that prioritizes gate repair and evidence freshness before any LTP implementation.

source_refs.contains: defer_ltp_and_refresh_evidence
Post-`GAP-113`, the correct way to decide what to do next is `scripts/select-next-work.py`.

claims.claim_text: Claude Code is an owner-directed first-class supported host alongside Codex in governance outcome, and current live evidence certifies both at native_attach tier while host APIs remain distinct and evidence-bound.

source_refs.contains: equal `native_attach` adapter tier when live host evidence proves session/resume identity, structured output, hook events, and managed settings/hooks
current `native_attach` tier are equal while host APIs remain distinct and evidence-bound

claims.claim_text: Fresh target-run evidence is not sufficient when the latest host capability posture is degraded; degraded fresh evidence must surface as attention and block implementation work, using wait_for_host_capability_recovery when bounded host-capability defer evidence is present.

source_refs.contains: fresh target-run evidence is degraded
degraded_latest_run_count
GAP-142 Degraded Fresh Evidence Next Work Guard

claims.claim_text: Evidence recovery posture is machine-checked across autonomous next-work selection, host-feedback target-run posture, and target-repo reuse effect feedback before new implementation or LTP work can proceed.

source_refs.contains: assert_evidence_recovery_posture
Write-CheckOk "evidence-recovery-posture"
